title: Southern Africa Liberation
description: Quiz on the national liberation movements in Southern Africa including Zambia, Malawi, Zimbabwe, Namibia, and Portuguese colonies.

questions.question: Who became the first president of independent Zambia in 1964?
In what year did Malawi become independent?
What did the white minority government of Southern Rhodesia declare in 1965?
Who led the white minority government that declared UDI in Southern Rhodesia?
Which two organisations led the guerrilla war for majority rule in Zimbabwe?
In what month and year did Zimbabwe achieve majority rule?
Which organisation led the struggle for Namibian independence?
In what year did Namibia finally win its independence?
Which of the following countries became independent in 1966?
Which two Portuguese colonies in Africa succeeded in overthrowing Portuguese colonialism in 1974?
